title: Sylvo Utility 1.0.1
changelog:
- Removed redundant general.reg toggle (tweaks are split into individual controls)
- Removed all MMCSS tweaks (Enable, Disable, Optimal)
- Registry sections now load only from General Windows tweaks.reg
- Fixed excluded tweak paths so bundled registry files no longer show duplicate toggles
- Installer, portable build, and in-app updater ship obfuscated SylvoUtility.dll from Secured only
- Fixed auto update
